name: openagent-coding
description: A collection of Claude Code skills for AI-assisted software engineering workflows

plugins.name: openagent-coding
plugins.description: All skills bundled — codebase analysis, PR review, stock research, Kubeflow pipelines, context management, session telemetry, and more.

plugins.name: code-tree
plugins.description: Build and query a knowledge graph of any codebase with call graph, test mapping, and impact analysis.

plugins.name: context-auto-summarizer
plugins.description: Automatic context window management with intelligent summarization and affinity clustering.

plugins.name: evaluate-and-improve
plugins.description: Evaluate agent outputs against quality standards and automatically retry targeted fixes when any category scores below threshold.

plugins.name: explain-code
plugins.description: Explains code with visual diagrams and analogies. Use when explaining how code works or teaching about a codebase.

plugins.name: financial-stock-analyzer
plugins.description: Comprehensive financial stock analysis providing buy/sell/hold recommendations based on multi-dimensional research.

plugins.name: kubeflow-pipelines
plugins.description: Write Kubeflow Pipelines SDK v2 pipelines for OpenShift AI (RHOAI) / Data Science Pipelines.

plugins.name: multi-agent-coordinator
plugins.description: Orchestrate parallel task execution across specialized agents based on todo list analysis.

plugins.name: output-evaluator
plugins.description: Evaluate agent outputs against system requirements and user requests with comprehensive quality analysis.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Review GitHub pull requests with structured impact and code-quality analysis.

plugins.name: pr-summary
plugins.description: Summarize changes in a pull request.

plugins.name: session-metrics-tracker
plugins.description: Background session telemetry that records context length, LLM call count, and human interrupt count with CSV/plot reports.
